diagnostic_trace.output:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-notification-service
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: ts-notification-service
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: ts-notification-service
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: ts-notification-service
        image: ghcr.io/sregym/ts-notification-service:latest
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        env:
        - name: SPRING_MAIN_ALLOW_CIRCULAR_REFERENCES
          value: 'true'
        - name: NODE_IP
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              fieldPath: status.hostIP
        envFrom:
        - secretRef:
            name: ts-notification-mysql
        - configMapRef:
            name: nacos
        - configMapRef:
            name: rabbitmq
        ports:
        - containerPort: 17853
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 300m
            memory: 400Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 2000Mi
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 17853
          initialDelaySeconds: 60
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-notification-service
spec:
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 17853
  selector:
    app: ts-notification-service
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-notification-mysql
type: Opaque
stringData:
  NOTIFICATION_MYSQL_HOST: tsdb-mysql-leader
  NOTIFICATION_MYSQL_PORT: '3306'
  NOTIFICATION_MYSQL_DATABASE: ts
  NOTIFICATION_MYSQL_USER: ts
  NOTIFICATION_MYSQL_PASSWORD: Uywvwcgrg515

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service

    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    chart: mysql-1.0.0
    heritage: Helm
    release: tsdb
  name: tsdb-mysql-leader
  namespace: train-ticket
  resourceVersion: "9769562"
  uid: 39215140-ce1f-4385-aa0d-dd6adc330876
spec:
  clusterIP: 10.68.109.147
  clusterIPs:
  - 10.68.109.147
  internalTrafficPolicy: Cluster
  ipFamilies:
  - IPv4
  ipFamilyPolicy: SingleStack
